proposed_catalog_row.Paper: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
proposed_catalog_row.ModelType: Linearized medium-scale New Keynesian DSGE with financial frictions
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Smets-Wouters core; habit; investment adjustment costs; variable utilization; price and wage rigidities; time-varying inflation target; BGG/CMR-style financial frictions
proposed_catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/Infation in the Great recession and New Keynesian models.pdf

proposed_status_row.paper_title: Inflation in the Great Recession and New Keynesian Models
proposed_status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Infation in the Great recession and New Keynesian models.pdf
proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation from paper-side log-linear equations; primitive optimization and nonlinear steady state deferred; title spelling mismatch recorded in manifest.

validation.git_diff_check: passed via git diff --check --no-index over untracked owned files

unresolved_issues: Primitive optimization problems are not fully printed in the paper.
Nonlinear steady-state formulas are external to the paper and need source-level review.
Financial-friction coefficient mapping should be checked against CMR/Del Negro-Schorfheide technical material.
Index metadata and raw PDF filename use 'Infation' while the Markdown title uses 'Inflation'.
